raw_jd: About Officeworks:Officeworks purpose is we bring big ideas to life at low prices. We are Australias leading omnichannel retailer of complete technology solutions, stationery, furniture, art supplies, and learning resources. We also offer services including Print & Create and Geeks2U. We begin with customersour products and services provide solutions to our diverse range of customers across Australia, from households, students, small to large-sized businesses, governments, and schools.About the Data and Analytics Function:By joining the Data, Analytics and AI Hub within Officeworks Global Capability Centre (GCC), you will play a pivotal role in enabling business growth and performance through insight, intelligence and innovation. You will support executing the strategy and accelerate the shift to a more digital and AI-native organization. Youll help build advanced capabilities that sit at the core of how the business understands customers, informs decisions, invests wisely, and delivers measurable value.The GCC is a critical enabler of Officeworks purpose, by providing data-driven insights, trusted analytics, and scalable AI solutions that empower smarter, faster decision making and support sustainable success.This is a unique opportunity to join as a founding member of a newly established global hub. Early joiners will help shape how data, analytics and AI shape Officeworks, influencing future ways of working, building critical capabilities, and driving the evolution of some

gemini_verdict.experience_reason: The JD provides no information regarding experience requirements, but professional GCC (Global Capability Center) roles titled 'Associate Engineer' without entry-level qualifiers typically require prior experience.
gemini_verdict.profile_reason: While the candidate has AI/Data Science education, the job description is incomplete, lacks specific requirements, and is for a GCC role which rarely targets freshers without explicit 'Graduate' or 'Trainee' labeling.
gemini_verdict.title: Associate Engineer - Data [T500-26928]
gemini_verdict.summary: This role is for a newly established Data, Analytics, and AI hub within a Global Capability Centre. The engineer will focus on building advanced data capabilities, analytics, and AI solutions to support business strategy.
gemini_verdict.match_reason: While the candidate has AI/Data Science education, the job description is incomplete, lacks specific requirements, and is for a GCC role which rarely targets freshers without explicit 'Graduate' or 'Trainee' labeling.
